name: @xunyoyo/clawkeeper-watcher
description: Core-only security spine for OpenClaw agents

scripts.smoke:scan: node --input-type=module -e "import { scanSkill } from './src/index.js'; const report = await scanSkill('./examples/unsafe-skill'); console.log(JSON.stringify({ score: report.score, findings: report.findings.length }, null, 2));"
